# Cafe 88 — Full Site Content

## About

Cafe 88 is a family-run café in El Cajon, California, operated by owner Kevin. The shop has been serving the community for years and is known for organic açaí bowls, hand-folded crepes, traditional Turkish coffee, hand-spun milkshakes, smoothies, and a wide range of desserts including Nutella sushi rolls, cream puffs, chocolate-covered strawberries, and Belgian waffles.

Location: 737 Jamacha Rd, El Cajon, CA 92019
Phone: (619) 312-1077
Instagram: @wecafe88 (https://www.instagram.com/wecafe88/)
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/wecafe88
Health Score: 98 out of 100
Rating: 4.6 stars across 231+ reviews

## Menu

### Açaí Bowls
- Paradise — Organic açaí with granola, blueberries, strawberries, banana, and toasted coconut.
- Hawaiian — Granola, pineapple, mango, kiwi, and coconut flakes.
- Lit — Granola, chocolate chip, banana, strawberry, and blueberry.
- Glow — Granola, strawberry, blueberry, shaved almond, and chia seeds.
- Power — Granola, blueberry, banana, hemp seeds, chia seeds, and almonds.
- Make Your Own — Pick your base, granola, fruit, and toppings.

### Crepes
- International Mix — Nutella, Kinder, Lotus, Belgian white and milk chocolate, strawberry, banana.
- French Style — Strawberry, banana, Nutella, KitKat, Oreos, Kinder, topped with Belgian chocolate and crushed pistachio.
- Nutella Pistachio — Nutella, pistachio cream, crushed pistachios.
- Kinder Mini Pancakes — Mini pancakes with Kinder chocolate, hazelnut, and fresh berries.

### Milkshakes
- Lotus — Biscoff cookie-butter shake with whipped cream and a Lotus cookie.
- Pistachio — Real pistachio cream blended into a thick shake.

### Beverages
- Turkish Coffee — Traditional fine-ground, served with foam.
- Glow Green Smoothie — Spinach, kale, pineapple, mango, banana, honey.

### Desserts
- Nutella Sushi Rolls — Crepe rolls with Nutella and fruit, sliced sushi-style.
- Cream Puffs — Choux pastry with vanilla cream.
- Chocolate Covered Strawberries — Fresh strawberries in chocolate.
- Belgian Waffles — Classic Belgian, warm, with toppings.

## Order

- DoorDash: https://www.doordash.com/store/cafe-88-el-cajon-799384
- Uber Eats: https://www.ubereats.com/store/cafe-88/GMmqPXDaSSeL9ox29TyUWg
- Grubhub: https://www.grubhub.com/restaurant/cafe-88-737-jamacha-road-el-cajon/1670792

For current pricing, order through DoorDash, Uber Eats, or Grubhub — or call (619) 312-1077.

## Catering

Cafe 88 offers catering throughout San Diego County. Açaí bowl bars, crepe stations, dessert spreads, and beverage service for offices, weddings, birthdays, and corporate events. 48-hour lead time preferred.

To book: call (619) 312-1077 or submit a request via the catering page.

## Payment

Credit, Debit, Apple Pay, Google Pay.

## Hours

Please call (619) 312-1077 to confirm current hours.
